cervdarktheme.config.backgroundColor.des: Background color of the loading screen. Vanilla: #EF323D
cervdarktheme.config.barColor.desc: Color of the progress bar fill. Vanilla: #FFFFFF
Color of the empty (unfilled) part of the progress bar.
cervdarktheme.config.borderColor.desc: Color of the progress bar border. Vanilla: #FFFFFF
cervdarktheme.config.logoColor.desc: Tint applied to the Mojang Studios logo. #FFFFFF keeps it untinted.
cervdarktheme.config.fadeInSeconds.desc: Fade-in duration of the loading screen, in seconds. Vanilla: 0.5
cervdarktheme.config.fadeOutSeconds.desc: Fade-out duration of the loading screen, in seconds. Vanilla: 1.0
Automatically sets earlyWindowControl = false in config/fml.toml so the fully themed vanilla loading screen is used. Takes effect on the next launch.
